# Intelligence Brief — April 18, 2026

*241 articles across 9 categories*

---

## Executive Summary

The European far-right is grappling with a shifting landscape following **Viktor Orbán**'s electoral setback in Hungary, even as key leaders like **Jordan Bardella** (**Rassemblement National**) and **Matteo Salvini** (**Lega**) convened in Milan to project unity on anti-immigration platforms. Meanwhile, the US **MAGA** movement is experiencing public internal dissent, particularly regarding its stance on foreign policy and the challenges faced by figures like **J.D. Vance**, while efforts continue to consolidate conservative policy blueprints for a potential future **Trump** administration.

## US Right-Wing / MAGA Developments

**Donald Trump** remains a central figure, with ongoing discussions about his past administration's policies, including lawsuits over border wall plans [[13]](https://news.google.?oc=5), offshore mining leases [[9]](https://news.google.?oc=5), and climate change regulations [[6]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxPYUNnTklsUWY2S3oxVnRid2JGVUN1MDZHd2VKeW9kNHJPY2lPdFh5aGlKczdtOFlHMXBmY2tDcTBHUzRkWWktOU1HQnhFczlvTUdmWDdEOHNQc2c1RGMwendOcFlvN0dJSmdpRlppaGVCNDlQaGZ5STNWOGtOSmRJZW5yUW5vdTk1U3laZ2s2SVkwN0xCbDZHbzRNeHVjT0UzMmFDNA?oc=5) [[24]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijgFBVV95cUxQdWZoNHBpTmk1SFEtNzNWc0dNWWZ3MnVkSEpJUXRSZHhqRVBGQ3gtckRqZXZNRmQ1ZXg5NGJvaUNEWS04ZFBoal9qV0VMZk5kWnJjX0hFRGxPSDQ3R0MycDVyNUFJLXRZUEI2MTJxTTlEcTNXTGl2NENjQUxRV1VYVzdpeHk3aDk5Zzlqd3hB?oc=5). Religious rhetoric is a notable, though sometimes controversial, aspect of the **Trump** movement [[1]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinAFBVV95cUxQR1BxQ2JCTmFmNWRBZFRzOVNKYmo4b2hkOFA5Njg0Z0RFcy1tY3FzZnEzNjJXanVaMXZDOEpyaVRrdW1LdUZpTDlGZ1ZjcUFETTU3cUFrNkx3dDR0RmJKYTZMWjJsdkJ3anpyTnJmTnlaSHRJTl9YaG5kS3lNdlg5SDJTdjJIRWRPWGlRTUlWQTBqOVRLcU9rRDVkVFI?oc=5) [[8]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxNdTJVVm5JNVNjWWpvemJPa1lEZlJ2am9OUGJlcHI4ZGZyVG16dk9OVEV4RnRfQ19TUFRvVEEyTUZJSTZvV0JIMk1UZ25pWEN5ZEZoY0hDazNGR1Z0RzhFbHhsamNoYWFvdURJRHhtVUs3M0toczlJUzdIOVBKNWNPTHByUkhtYUpBYmI3d1lWZGJKSkk3RW1lX3VPSkZ0SHV4b0w1RHFWMURlSVJ0dGZpZWZma3dCWVE0M3ZB?oc=5) [[22]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihgFBVV95cUxPTTc0OHR1Q1ppZlRYSGljSVdTc2lSUm5ZaGVGZzJuZE9xTWxUbGJtQjhZMGNmdUh0Yk40STViNHFDV2ZjZ3pOcXl2ellqbjgxSkJveDFsLUc1LVFyQ2dIWnM3czVQOVBqQnFPcDcyelMwU0xPV0lnS3psSVRuc09XTnhCQVlCdw?oc=5). Significant internal divisions are becoming public within the **MAGA** movement, with **Trump** reportedly "blasting podcasters" and "raging" at "MAGA rebels" on Truth Social [[14]](https://news.google.?oc=5) [[15]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirwFBVV95cUxQOEk3d1dYUENtQTAyczNUMFZxV19NSUQ0eVRaMG9hTlpOc3djNklnVERYY29USWFsOEJ3S0QzSm5heWVhbjJGRkd5Y1gwbnZCVl91M21WUmJYTEtCdWN4SjNRVkRyR01JWTBSRHF0VGF3U1h6R0ItbjAwWkxjWG15Z19kRGZHZmhfUWhJd3pqeUpHc3dFa1o4elFiVEZlMDhIdjdTNVdzWi0tdXRMWWJ3?oc=5). Some proponents even suggest that a recent assassination attempt against **Trump** was staged [[12]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxOandBSlJvMFg5RTlZQ25UbkdfaUdleGtuc0pSai1DdzVtazRmckNLNlhoRUpFTnA5NUs1OUpob1BSVVFaaERLdElLUkNVVWx3ODdpaS1VMG5LeGtxQXlFN3VPQ3FmSXlxOUgtNE9tei1URHhyVHQxX0l2SG90N05LUzRaZ19jTHRLN1hmOFlzWkZ1X0FxOHpITUlDV01qcDlLXzZFUA?oc=5). **J.D. Vance** has faced a challenging period, being tested as **Trump**'s chief defender [[11]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilwFBVV95cUxQRjdLaXk0MWQ1dkJGQlJFa2dFTEdwVjM2cF9KSk11Q25sb3RSSk4yTk50QXdaVC0yMGl1R3VBVVpnSEtERmJaLXRmUXJOTjZvc3czNmNCWHVOR2RLSXhGUWkyM1ZDNGhKbHl1a2s0Z3hobkt3VTAtV1I1ODhaTVU1TjZoT2R1bnNLRE9jcUdMLTdMTWN1WE44?oc=5) and drawing criticism amid a "bumpy ride" [[4]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMidkFVX3lxTE1Jby02Tk5nLU8tX3REVXB0UFlpcE8xZVprVnZtSkVFRldIeWpVWnVINEJKRGFEWFB4ekMyWl9jRHM5ZWN5MmFKT0pka0NfcHBNclI2TUdOc1ctUzdGOGQ0R3NHQ1BNNEJMcFB2S1Q1WGxfU202cFE?oc=5). Discussions continue about a potential second **Trump** administration, with policy blueprints like Project 2025 gaining attention [[199]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipgFBVV95cUxQSnBLamU0UGZEbFM4b1R1Rlh3TDgyVW9wSmtFdnUtV084ellTcWNCcF9xNXBjeDlCQnNBdVFtaHpjQzBQZV9MUzNibEcxSzY1MklqOTJVWVlrdGpqVFpfVkRpX2lHYnVnR3JKLWhMMS1kZU1icFcwYV9jR3h5NjhYa1V3b2ZkQkRZVzZQY282eDNNNS1pbnNWZVU2STVrNTJKNmppVDh3?oc=5) [[220]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiaEFVX3lxTFB1TFZ5NlhmbkljTVhNc0tYbWoyU2Rham5vSTdwNVRTOG9lZzVzX0xVVzJUQk04R1FiMUllZFdiSURKeHpIMUM4eTdEMDBtbEhadENGNlBpcEEzOGVqeS1COG1UMGxqOVp0?oc=5). **Trump**'s foreign policy stances, which some critics characterize as viewing war not as a moral issue but as an aspect of American imperialism, are also under scrutiny [[2]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigAFBVV95cUxQeW1TdVhrNy1OVWtMMGZ0NnB4ZUZMWkRvbVlrV3dEaHYyYllNQm9FT1Q3cFJrVHZZM2ZrQjdLdXhWVVIxRFJ0NXc0clZob2g3YUxlVXNQWThoM0ZfSVNNUWNBWDBPaTE3dWtOLXhNSXBqTkw0TXV3S3Z5Y2hyVjg1Nw?oc=5) [[5]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihwFBVV95cUxQaDFrbE1kOEYxNVVmY1ctRGQtdE1VRXVreVNMYmR4VHI4OVlCTmNhYi1NWXF1eDZmVnd1UnpGQjVpcnRld0tvTWJ6TEtRc3dkUmc2WFVTanEwdlBxQTVOdlU2MXZaQTloOXVqU1BaQl9MZkhRQTVUUmdEeExXVktheWlzZFlPSm8?oc=5).

## European Far-Right Unity and Challenges

A significant event was the Milan rally organized by **Matteo Salvini**'s **Lega**, bringing together leaders such as **Jordan Bardella** of **Rassemblement National** (RN) and **Geert Wilders** to express opposition to immigration and the European Union [[77]](https://news.google.?oc=5). This transnational gathering aimed to project unity and revitalize the **Lega** [[98]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxNWkRJVlJaZWVZZjdTX1hsN0xHbWFMa29zR2swM2VUNFpZWTBmeDR3c3E5MFZJMHdCS1QtQ0VQM3hpazRIRXhjbmliT1h2dXdCeGxFVkRHcWZ3RjNOSFhWNU1xRHcwUDV2d0hfc2tjSWswR0NGbnl1Y2ZSRjM1QTc4M05mUm9PRm1Nb1RJV3E2OUZ4cERoZmZlTEdoUGtldw?oc=5). However, this show of force occurred amidst significant challenges for the broader European populist right, particularly following **Viktor Orbán**'s electoral setback in Hungary, which saw his **Fidesz** party lose symbolic strongholds [[236]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixwFBVV95cUxNVDA5a2kwWksxQ3FaSjF4SElIMlNKc1pyem5PVnNNRkFEYTNjTUFQbjRHcUR5ZkhMNHkzbUpRWjMyVlpJTnRBM2taZDFFay1hT05zampnbFE3bTNwT19OUHFjVGkxUWg4SGE0b25rbVNXZEYtV3VfRWRCMml4djBRSVZhY2NXdHB3d0FlblVpb05aQXFwck5yX0VmNXVZMldEY2FhSFNPVWJjYjMyRmNfWTlLZWpGRndDLVNuNkZYS2N5Vk41dFNv?oc=5). **Orbán** acknowledged the need for "complete renewal" within his party [[238]](https://news.google.?oc=5), and his defeat has raised questions about the sustainability of the "anti-EU narrative" [[183]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiyAFBVV95cUxNbk9iUzRUeF9EZ01tQUhQTWtSaVdPTnlJWXFYd3VUTndlZG5UN0ZaWnVHdlRoVFpfWmdPV1ZURmN0alQyUmNMNllGdFEtRGR6bG1JWlZhanpYZWxFb2JTT3VVZXRKc3hxeFEwck12UURWVmx2dWh6eFNMVXU2MEJkOFZ3U25zOGkxV3l4cG16ZTlGa1J2S0ZsZ3VSU1BEU09Qak1va09IMzQyd0gyaTdIQTZFTVRQdnktUGRkbTZmdEpQMTZNUG9XSA?oc=5) and its potential impact on funding for populist right figures in other countries [[233]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiekFVX3lxTFBnZWZ1QVZZTmEySDBPM0xmYTFPLXJqX2loQThSTjJ6ZGJLT0RIcGtLaDA1RmtTb0V2cnlmN1lHRnlnbC1wa09OSlY0VzZDc0F3Wl9ReG5jVG1MRzhwS19Zb0hnNWdQcTNaRjM0SU5zT24wNHctQ1FSYTd3?oc=5) [[235]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimgFBVV95cUxOcm5TeVM5aDNMbGVxdVJxd0xOV2dIWWhhWGQzeE9YYnFobVJaZEZGUExrdEdGYzZwUTcyak9UTDVSMWVGUTJkbl9Lb0k3MnR4YzBhNnBRWG9JeVFFRjNTWXZHSmZSNUh1dzdrc1ZGQkp3SzRNb3NPbGtCZlFoejhzRnhwT1F2TVpPVjNSUjNWMkFpTFludWthMmln?oc=5). The relationship with **Donald Trump** also appears complex, with some European far-right figures reportedly seeking to "keep their distance" [[166]](https://news.google.?oc=5) from what they perceive as his "toxic" influence [[187]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxNazZPUlN6UkNnaUp5UTVBZEd4N3AtaDc2bGZTUndXT1FXbnp2V3hmaldKT0o4al9EUGZ2a3ZmMjJQSnNUeURBWjc2Q3A5c2Voc0R0RUd2WUsxcDVRTXgtcHNzMWxCcjV2UGtvaTA0aVdiOVlrbW91NlZkY0RKdTVaYzNVaDA2ZUh6WXNsUzBjNWllVUstWHd4d0JRTnZCUl9GcVZWVERiTm0zT0lGek9OVHVoRG91alZF?oc=5). Notably, **Marine Le Pen** of **RN** engaged in a new diplomatic outreach by meeting with the Israeli ambassador [[83]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxOSGxtTUxnOEpZRDNHcWFtWnJiaXpHLV8xNnFEa21TNnBpT05KS2twZXJDVjlvdlFrZUhTbnRqZTNaUnRtOXdzY04yV01UaFh4RzhJRXoyNTFvODVxSkRSYmZaUVpiXy1YU2JxeVBJT29OM1hxbEhkbXlzUEhjVUNLb0MzSG5PT1owSUo3Q3JCdW1MNFQ1SlZ6N1NmeWFhS3dKS1ZGWDU2aXhGMnM?oc=5) [[89]](https://news.google.?oc=5) [[189]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiyAFBVV95cUxOM2ZGX2xlckxack9KM1FsMzY5UWdFYVlKUDhnUzlnVWRUajVCWThVX19RdGpkMnotanRuOVotTWh6RnZWVTlMVlpISDR2UWVCdHVmZFdhUkd3V2xqbTR5V0l4aE5jS1ZMbDhGLWJIX1hWTVIxaUx0LUNXbXhBRm9fX3JqWmpBalRkM0JEVF9VMnBvQ241OWp4WEZ1QVJ6UlBlM2RILWdYOU80NGxHeDh2bHZGMWhSd3hWVGlXQ3dDX0Fvb2dtQ2N5Uw?oc=5).

## Immigration and National Identity

Immigration remains a core focus for several far-right parties. In Sweden, **Sverigedemokraterna** (SD) announced an "upgrade" to their migration map, explicitly stating that immigrants "should not be able to hide" [[59]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihgFBVV95cUxNWXpyYVBkejFxbmlaaUhQRUFnVVY5alNYVk5FNTJGQ3FUcUVaQ1RqVjBwampBbmcyZGh6aTRwa1hYSF9mQThZTEllMjFiT1BmS1h4RlNybXRmNTBQU1h3aWdrNWt4Yno0TTdnNU5jNmZTU0dpR0NwdjQtMURGRjlqTjBNYzFHdw?oc=5). In Norway, **Fremskrittspartiet** (FrP) leader **Sylvi Listhaug** controversially argued that Norway's system unfairly favors "criminal immigrants" over "labor immigrants," advocating for better conditions for the latter [[47]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiywFBVV95cUxNT3pBejliZHBiVjJSUHdTX0Jsd21iSVEwLU43ZUxOdVg5WXFadVU2emxsNjB2enEyV1NPZ3EtdW1fd0dYMGhrRVF4NXRoMTZhemFGQ2FhaHRvTXNRVjRFb0JidG5WbFJacEd2cE9FTER4a1hxbmJOM01UVlhTWWZrenAtQUNZRndOdmNTcEU0R1dGY254Sk56V0IwenJSRjJiTDhScmdBZW14bi1VMlVNcXlPem1wX0ExYnIxOVdxanhncFBMb2VwSkppQQ?oc=5) [[49]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxPWjBsdnFOS2FpX1B6M3A3VnBYcmRlTWFkQ3RWeG9oWVpHRzlWc3JqbFZoMHE3VGl1c1RmN3dxS2cxQ2NzLW8xVFFmdm9OUUpyMFpwNENTd3pLRExzNWtDTWd1VTZUYTFpMXJsRXBTak1qeWZZZTBudEd0RTZ4cGNkTjcyZmFrRFZDUmMtWjFNYXRPSUZ6N2tTMlBOMkhvUnVvb0taWFFhZUdGblJfOHpkUGVTSW5JemsxcWQ4?oc=5). The Milan rally, attended by **Rassemblement National** and **Lega** leaders, served as a platform for unified opposition to immigration [[77]](https://news.google.?oc=5). The US **Trump** administration's previous efforts to build a border wall in regions like Big Bend continue to face legal challenges from local residents and environmental groups [[13]](https://news.google.?oc=5) [[21]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigAFBVV95cUxPbE9jVFdncnhfWlFTQ0hFMWs4X2lYN3ZXQzJDZy1CMkZVUmRsWno5dWRMYWd3SDRXQWJEbFZKaW9FVWZ3YnBIcnRLSXVDcng0YVJtMGY2aWlMTDhrMGhieVdoT2JWMHBPOUJ1NXVsbWxESUlmdWpMdzlwelFTVUJ2YQ?oc=5). In Italy, the **Lega** promoted the concept of "remigration" during its Milan event, which contrasted with a coalition partner's call for migrant integration [[96]](https://news.google.?oc=5).

## Economic Agendas and Business Outreach

French **Rassemblement National** (RN) is intensifying its efforts to engage with the business community, with **Jordan Bardella** planning to correspond with company leaders to identify "norms and taxes that weigh on wealth production" [[65]](https://news.google.?oc=5). This outreach aims to bolster the party's economic credibility, though reports indicate it still "struggles to establish credibility among economic circles" [[87]](https://news.google.?oc=5) [[185]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxPWU9pMDF3WTNLdjJFaXlENlFHTS0xQ0JOV1JnR0l4bEszZ0h6elBudlp4eHdXbWlLektTRi1ldWJJekMyNUUwNVJ1RTdaTVk5YXZLeFpTeFBpOFdyTGZsemVjZTB3UHktaTNiWk13Tm9ZQnZfRUpBWlYwU0dNaGNyZ3QwOWVfRFZ4YVctQkJQWF9YazlJMnBzVmFpZE9rRms?oc=5). **Marine Le Pen** also held meetings with major business figures [[75]](https://news.google.?oc=5). In Italy, **Prime Minister Meloni** (**Fratelli d'Italia**) addressed the Federalberghi National Assembly [[95]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxNQmxjVTJZR1JYU1dTNE9Pd2FlOVREcDVWWFZxNktQczRHb2xUajdpNVM2ODkwcVJwSVhoLWJxeWlpeUNIanB4U3FxWXhYcHRaNUE1SExjMlgtMXhrbGFXalQ5ZGMyemlfYmptUnY4SWRhRE1RZS1sQVdkZF9ESlgwSmN6NWNMN2pBcnNHeXBOLUpDbE9oY0hpeDhJVmdOMmc?oc=5), demonstrating engagement with the hospitality industry. The **Lega**'s Milan rally also touched upon economic concerns, including opposition to certain EU policies [[98]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxNWkRJVlJaZWVZZjdTX1hsN0xHbWFMa29zR2swM2VUNFpZWTBmeDR3c3E5MFZJMHdCS1QtQ0VQM3hpazRIRXhjbmliT1h2dXdCeGxFVkRHcWZ3RjNOSFhWNU1xRHcwUDV2d0hfc2tjSWswR0NGbnl1Y2ZSRjM1QTc4M05mUm9PRm1Nb1RJV3E2OUZ4cERoZmZlTEdoUGtldw?oc=5). In the UK, **Reform UK** is facing scrutiny regarding its economic proposals, with internal disagreements on whether to publish costings for its Welsh policies [[132]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWkFVX3lxTE1jeHBrWktyLUJDUzV1VmJ6QlRtR2M4YmQ2UE1Mb0VqemlWZV9MUExhdTdydDJtZUdVekZUMXFiYXBiMFFLNzJSNTJuaHdCSldZdWtVNFlNRkoydw?oc=5), and **Nigel Farage** appearing to retract previous commitments to reopen blast furnaces [[133]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirwFBVV95cUxQaVBPMXlFUVRJNzRxejY2dGJneWtjRWl3ZU9QQmVtaGRzeG1qa0JFMG5PdmVWN0RYN3I1NzI1UEpvVUg0LVBMSXdiUFBrZlVGM2dtTkE3eEpzYzRXU3V1cHBibTBRNlBkWnd3SUcyUnFyR3hDYnpyZE1PdDVpZXNqbXp2d1BFcHY0aEhxTnRSX0FJQ3JQdTZZRFdsbGozT1d5QkEweHFpMnJ4SXBENzRV?oc=5).

## Social and Cultural Fronts

The "manosphere" continues to be a prominent topic, identified as a digital phenomenon influencing young men and creating familial divisions [[134]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiigFBVV95cUxOeFJSLUFTOWFXWTRTMnRqek1STktTTmJVR21GWWdCVXMxZGVVcWtKMERWX2ZWRVZZMUFlWUVhbW9ZVUxSaFg1RDg5SjJSc05aalhOc1BhZTFDWF9JMkR6REVYVjNZVmFmZ0FNUXNJOVJIbG43a0Y2bEpTQmg4dzZKOXFINUtnZ2w5cGc?oc=5) [[148]](https://news.google.?oc=5) [[149]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisAFBVV95cUxQUUk5c2lYVTYzQ0lUWFZOYW03YVE2LTVzQ1hTMDZJNjk0ZUYwWVhwYnpSMU1IWFMxZ3UzNkR4M0ZWN2hOZ2hVamxscnJoU1ZJb2pkVlFRVmEyVHo1ZWdkVlBsVGxzZW5pejFUV3BGbElOZld6YVR3S25tU2R2cGp5aTNxZlUxM09nUnpPM3k3QVZhSTdRNmZjU0p6bnVsYjN1SVhGMWZfQnN0Wl83VGtfaA?oc=5) [[152]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMibkFVX3lxTFB4b1B0SS1WVlRsS2tkX0dXVUNJNWhRRWVLcldWaG93SGpRMzZWdlNaQ19fbngwRUNmNnhNOWktdEkzeEZhVlJ1TGYwU045SWpZUnE5RTJ5WjNJSnRvOEh0LXpBaWVDYS1DOEVpbG13?oc=5). Reports suggest some members of the "manosphere" are growing disillusioned with **Trump** as the **MAGA** movement shows fractures [[153]](https://news.google.?oc=5). Public figures, including actor **Theo James**, have criticized the "meaningless bravado" associated with the manosphere [[162]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxQTXpRcFVJX2Y4U0Q4WTRqVXB0WFBHQ09wUGhvbEozaEdzdXd5RnZxaFVaMnd3MTN2QlNzbHVrRFBMbXo0V1B2bHFWb25lTEhxaEV3ZlRLQTAyZURrUldsbXZERXlhbU5nX1BmV0xwdkNDb3pVeExIUmZzYUI0VXJ6Q2E4dWlXR3NORHgzcXFXMVhHbEl0VTdiQ2I0LU1DQQ?oc=5). Religious rhetoric remains a significant, though at times contentious, element within the **Trump** movement [[1]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinAFBVV95cUxQR1BxQ2JCTmFmNWRBZFRzOVNKYmo4b2hkOFA5Njg0Z0RFcy1tY3FzZnEzNjJXanVaMXZDOEpyaVRrdW1LdUZpTDlGZ1ZjcUFETTU3cUFrNkx3dDR0RmJKYTZMWjJsdkJ3anpyTnJmTnlaSHRJTl9YaG5kS3lNdlg5SDJTdjJIRWRPWGlRTUlWQTBqOVRLcU9rRDVkVFI?oc=5) [[8]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxNdTJVVm5JNVNjWWpvemJPa1lEZlJ2am9OUGJlcHI4ZGZyVG16dk9OVEV4RnRfQ19TUFRvVEEyTUZJSTZvV0JIMk1UZ25pWEN5ZEZoY0hDazNGR1Z0RzhFbHhsamNoYWFvdURJRHhtVUs3M0toczlJUzdIOVBKNWNPTHByUkhtYUpBYmI3d1lWZGJKSkk3RW1lX3VPSkZ0SHV4b0w1RHFWMURlSVJ0dGZpZWZma3dCWVE0M3ZB?oc=5). In the UK, a homelessness charity severed ties with **Sharon Osbourne** following her public support for a far-right rally featuring **Tommy Robinson**, citing a conflict with their organizational values [[135]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimwFBVV95cUxPaDhHY29PNDlSb3Bkem1wSGc3b2dPci0zQ1RjQjEwOE9pLWRWbTN5TjVVOTBRaF9Ka0JXMFRVTUhqcmJ2OVdua2tBNDdCb2JzajVYYTdidnQteVM5TWltWW96U3FZbks2Y2F6bU9yelJTaUJEMjRBcGVvalljV3pVOERwTXlDcmJRajlicTBhUElJZXNRRDktaE8yMA?oc=5) [[143]](https://news.google.?oc=5). Discussions around "gender ideology" and its societal implications were also noted within conservative think tanks [[202]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxNX3B4TkpoWXhlWHpXckFJbXBlUzlSbmMtVTFVSWpmVi04VmhfTzFkWVhtc2FVSlRzVkUzR1VHZFN4dFBNZU0wUTdTaWc5SVFDUXZrUzJ1N2RMcjVzbHZrdkI3WUpReTI3TDNjVjNwQmtwV2RueFY3elMwdzN2VXlpVVV4NS05eGtqQnhLbmxOQXV5T1NwQS00TTNyZDdlYlNTUmJiX3QyU1ZzNDVVTDhYUEVXZEU?oc=5).

## Internal Party Dynamics and Controversies

Internal dissent is growing within the **MAGA** movement, as **Trump** publicly criticizes rebels and podcasters [[14]](https://news.google.?oc=5) [[15]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirwFBVV95cUxQOEk3d1dYUENtQTAyczNUMFZxV19NSUQ0eVRaMG9hTlpOc3djNklnVERYY29USWFsOEJ3S0QzSm5heWVhbjJGRkd5Y1gwbnZCVl91M21WUmJYTEtCdWN4SjNRVkRyR01JWTBSRHF0VGF3U1h6R0ItbjAwWkxjWG15Z19kRGZHZmhfUWhJd3pqeUpHc3dFa1o4elFiVEZlMDhIdjdTNVdzWi0tdXRMWWJ3?oc=5), raising questions about a "turning point" for the movement [[10]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikgFBVV95cUxNX0o2akRpTGh5VnVtRXZzazZoU2VFdTdhZGRqZVp1VjdVWjByN1pjZ204OWhqR1F5OFIxQXBwU2NGNnljalJ6U045TUQ0VnlxeFBrd3Q3ZjhSeXpNVFQzNmIzWkxGdmxEOVZIMkVrNm5mX2Z3dFYtZFBUWV9XYzZHcnF3eERMYnV4SWFnbkRlSmRLQQ?oc=5). **J.D. Vance**'s position as a key **Trump** defender is reportedly encountering challenges [[4]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMidkFVX3lxTE1Jby02Tk5nLU8tX3REVXB0UFlpcE8xZVprVnZtSkVFRldIeWpVWnVINEJKRGFEWFB4ekMyWl9jRHM5ZWN5MmFKT0pka0NfcHBNclI2TUdOc1ctUzdGOGQ0R3NHQ1BNNEJMcFB2S1Q1WGxfU202cFE?oc=5). In Norway, **Fremskrittspartiet** (FrP) is preparing for leadership decisions, with **Sylvi Listhaug** proposed for re-election [[42]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMickFVX3lxTE5hZUNDeXM1UGhiVFpwYlFEdXJGVzVMa2IyT19DZlQwNjRGc0xBTE90Y1FKbjIwLVBYNzdEQU9QUzAxSVNrazY3NEs1R01HMEtsRkZNZnlwZk5OZXNOSXdrM2tWblRJWm9mRDJRZmlkd2Vsdw?oc=5) and a new candidate, **Velle**, suggested for a top position [[43]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMieEFVX3lxTE5LenFsdmViZWtJbjQzeTFhMXpRbW5tTjFDWUIwaUpQN0J5dDNzY2g5QjFRTmJfaHJHeWROTGZZeUdGbF9ENC1DMlMzR2RwbWlqV29kZGxLOEZwWmxudV9KSDFmMmJTbm0xeFY0MEcxd0NtaHFsNS1pNg?oc=5). The party also saw a defection from the **Høyre** party [[34]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilAFBVV95cUxNb0MxUWhuejZHVE5iOXZnOHFmVXFzdTdQSjI4RUpiTTlzcWN2YTZ6NkpkNFFPVHotMXVoOUlVZFpRT2RlNmhPalIzdVRTSFo3akhkVzREZ0YtSXVrMjZQNFdPeGxvS2VnWllrb2RvT1VqdHNmQ3dKbDhuamhCeU9TNE1kVXlPUXREY3NXX1VSN20wdkh3?oc=5). **Rassemblement National** (RN) leadership is navigating rumors of tension between **Jordan Bardella** and **Marine Le Pen** ahead of the upcoming presidential election [[70]](https://news.google.?oc=5). **Bardella**'s highly publicized relationship with **Maria Carolina de Bourbon des Deux-Siciles** has garnered significant media attention, with some speculation about its strategic rollout [[67]](https://news.google.?oc=5) [[69]](https://news.google.?oc=5) [[88]](https://news.google.?oc=5). **Reform UK** in Britain is dealing with multiple controversies, including allegations of offensive social media posts by several local election candidates [[111]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxORGEyWGxJT0M5Qm44b3BUZDlPQ2VUWDJlanVuZzJpVUpjSWFlYk5iMldHdW1nOVJRZGZrb2JNMU40Q1NzSUdIQjFYSjk4bVZqdFFsZG5PVUVaSTdNTk93Z1FKN29jNDBYLTF5SjhBY1N2eUd1VlNQRmxMR2drQTJFZER5Ym1sbzJQVV80dlV0X2xVR3lFNEs2ODRxdnBMeTJINFlNcUtjdFBXUDY1ZEMxSU0xZno?oc=5) [[123]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitwFBVV95cUxQT2JCc2VHbS1ZaW1CYkJ4N2FsU1N4S0otR043ckJsTFVTVHVlbmlKUjl4Uy1STEI3OWJUZG1TYU1zU3A3R01icGZsRnpXSzBoSkhGMHpYNTdZY3VjNk9ERmtuZ19TLWxXMy1Uc2VBYVFQNnNNX1dYVUQ2bVNoRVljZFMwUmxEcTluLVhLRFNkVEYtWDVHWW5rRTJzaVQ2RjVXSktoY29mNzZEeUtUMWExOGxoM1dWS1U?oc=5) [[130]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE1CLXVzdlN2R1RMelBmNjdHWC15S3pHVFFGM2xYeURUVlRoUVJ2WFNIeGU1TU5XdWpPMFhSeHlIYkNYZEIxWnVFWHdDdUx2YjJoa1QxOThJUWlTOUdm?oc=5). Furthermore, the party experienced the removal of its group leader in Worcestershire [[117]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTFBCVDRfZ3hIUW9ld3diUnp6ZmFXVXlJal9jYmxBRmdLanpOVFhEUE15bXhoWGs2T2xHU0hJaEEyelJCZFB2VkdkUUFlZGxMWlVGZjJlSlhFODVGdnNn?oc=5). In Hungary, **Fidesz** is undertaking "soul-searching" and facing calls for "complete renewal" following **Orbán**'s electoral setback [[238]](https://news.google.?oc=5) [[241]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxPbk9GS1dnTUNKc1ZxZ080cUlZWnVQdmNqRXBoeDFnS2NmTTNoX3VvVGdLTDY1SHNDaUQ0bzJOYU50d3dqbjQtMVNtc0xmYy0wX3JhQklVVFd5M0s3QWFSazN2d1ZpeGtQMWhGNmlwZXM2Q3k4MzZMSWprUmRQS0hYQ3NXWW9QVzlOS2RzNzVES05JX1F6Z1lUN1VKR1ExMFlT?oc=5).

## Watchlist

1.  **Post-Orbán European Far-Right Realignment:** The long-term implications of **Viktor Orbán**'s electoral setback on the unity, funding, and strategic alliances within the transnational European far-right, particularly as it heads into key EU elections.
2.  **MAGA Internal Fractures and J.D. Vance's Enduring Role:** Continued monitoring of the public dissent within the **MAGA** movement and how **J.D. Vance** and other key figures navigate their roles as **Trump**'s defenders amid ongoing criticism and political challenges.
3.  **Rassemblement National's Business and Diplomatic Strategy:** The effectiveness of **Rassemblement National**'s intensified efforts to improve its economic credibility with French business leaders and its evolving diplomatic engagements, such as **Marine Le Pen**'s meeting with the Israeli ambassador, in broadening its mainstream appeal.
---
